<details><summary>Tool use: **run_terminal_command_v2** • Run command: cd /Users/Samit/Data/Work/HW/rl/verl-omni && python -c "
import tomllib
from pathlib import Path
# Simulate what pip/setuptools sees
import subprocess, json, sys
r = subprocess.run([sys.executable, '-m', 'pip', 'install', '-e', '.', '--dry-run', '--report', '-'], capture_output=True, text=True, cwd='/Users/Samit/Data/Work/HW/rl/verl-omni')
print('returncode', r.returncode)
if r.stderr:
    print('stderr', r.stderr[:2000])
if r.stdout:
    import json as j
    try:
        rep = j.loads(r.stdout)
        # pip report structure: install, version, etc.
        for k in ('install', 'metadata', 'environment'):
            if k in rep:
                print(k, 'keys', list(rep[k].keys()) if isinstance(rep[k], dict) else type(rep[k]))
        inst = rep.get('install', {})
        reqs = inst.get('requirements', [])
        print('num requirements', len(reqs))
        for item in reqs[:40]:
            print(item.get('metadata', {}).get('name', item), item.get('requested', ''))
    except Exception as e:
        print('stdout', r.stdout[:3000])
"
</summary>

```bash
cd /Users/Samit/Data/Work/HW/rl/verl-omni && python -c "
import tomllib
from pathlib import Path
# Simulate what pip/setuptools sees
import subprocess, json, sys
r = subprocess.run([sys.executable, '-m', 'pip', 'install', '-e', '.', '--dry-run', '--report', '-'], capture_output=True, text=True, cwd='/Users/Samit/Data/Work/HW/rl/verl-omni')
print('returncode', r.returncode)
if r.stderr:
    print('stderr', r.stderr[:2000])
if r.stdout:
    import json as j
    try:
        rep = j.loads(r.stdout)
        # pip report structure: install, version, etc.
        for k in ('install', 'metadata', 'environment'):
            if k in rep:
                print(k, 'keys', list(rep[k].keys()) if isinstance(rep[k], dict) else type(rep[k]))
        inst = rep.get('install', {})
        reqs = inst.get('requirements', [])
        print('num requirements', len(reqs))
        for item in reqs[:40]:
            print(item.get('metadata', {}).get('name', item), item.get('requested', ''))
    except Exception as e:
        print('stdout', r.stdout[:3000])
"

```
